notes.heading: Console gets its own tab
notes.body: Live task output, server logs, and control activity now have a dedicated Console tab with search, auto-scroll, command input, and more room to breathe.

notes.heading: Command windows are visible
notes.body: Install, update, repair, backup, restore, and stop tasks now request a visible Windows command window while still mirroring output back into the app.

notes.heading: 72-hour log retention
notes.body: The control app prunes its own activity log to the last 72 hours and only shows recent retained output so logs do not grow forever.
